channel.title: Invest on Alan Zhan Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Invest on Alan Zhan Blog

item.title: The Forrest Gump Investment Method
item.description: I remember about three years ago, when I was a complete stock market beginner. Right after learning about the Taiwan stock market, I jumped straight into trading. My first stock was CTBC Financial Holdings (2891) — I still remember the ticker clearly. But watching the daily ups and downs was nerve-wracking, and I eventually couldn’t take it anymore and sold. Fortunately, I made a tiny profit — enough for a lunch box — rather than losing money. That was lucky indeed. Then, by chance, I came across “The Forrest Gump Investment Method,” which launched my journey into index investing. Today, I’d like to introduce this book.
